title: Dean Lawford
extract: Dean Lawford (born 9 May 1977) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for Dewsbury Moor of the National Conference League, Sheffield Eagles, Leeds Rhinos, Bramley, Huddersfield Giants, Halifax, Batley Bulldogs, Widnes Vikings and Dewsbury Rams, as a scrum-half.
